title: No Directional Damage Tilt
description: Removes the directional damage tilt from the client, essentially bringing MC-26678 back into the game
body:
# No Directional Damage Tilt

Removes the directional damage tilt from the client. Essentially bringing MC-26678 back into the game.
This mod can be useful if you prefer the old damage tilt from MC 1.19.3 and below.
This is compatible with the "Damage Tilt" accesibility setting so you can adjust the strength of the tilt.

Thanks to [ArchTurtie on PMC](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/archturtie/) for [the idea](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/visible-glint-1-20-snapshots/comment/10225840/#reply_10225840)
